perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a pink cardigan and patterned bucket hat stands in a warehouse aisle in front of a shelf of decorative cookie tins. She gestures enthusiastically toward the products. (2) She picks up a blue tin to show a dent, then replaces it. She then picks up a green tin and rotates it to show the bottom mechanism. (3) The camera focuses on close-up shots of blue, red, and green tins featuring winter village scenes as they sit on the shelf. The Costco Wholesale logo is overlaid throughout the top of the frame.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic background music starts. A high-pitched, excited female voice begins speaking about a deal. (2) The music continues as the female speaker discusses price and color options. A mechanical tinkling sound of a music box playing 'Winter Wonderland' is heard when the green tin is handled. (3) The upbeat music continues to play through the end of the clip as the speaker's voice fades.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '一次擁有 音樂盒 + 奶油餅乾' (Own both at once: Music box + Butter cookies) - Enthusiastic hook. (2) '349元 這麼大一桶' (349 yuan, such a big bucket) - Informative. (3) '我覺得藍色很漂亮' (I think the blue one is very pretty) - Subjective opinion. (4) '我來的時候發現他已經被凹爆了' (I found it was already dented when I arrived) - Observation. (5) '小朋友應該會喜歡' (Kids should like it) - Suggestion. (6) '也有餅乾喔' (There are also cookies) - Informative.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Inspection -> Close-up Detail Showcase

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator featured throughout the clip.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman wearing a fuzzy pink cardigan over a yellow top, a black skirt, and a grey and black patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with industrial shelving units, stacked red boxes, and various merchandise in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation/vlog to showcase a specific festive product (a music box cookie tin) found at Costco, highlighting its value, design, and interactive features to encourage viewers to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Reviewing and promoting a specific item found at a branded retailer.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style with descriptive text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Classic retail-discovery content targeted at budget-conscious or seasonal shoppers.
